name: A+B?
statement: You are given an expression of the form $a{+}b$, where $a$ and $b$ are integers from $0$ to $9$. You have to evaluate it and print the result.
input:
The first line contains one integer $t$ ($1 \le t \le 100$) — the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of one line containing an expression of the form $a{+}b$ ($0 \le a, b \le 9$, both $a$ and $b$ are integers). The integers are not separated from the $+$ sign.
output: For each test case, print one integer — the result of the expression.
